title: Every Integer Has an Additive Inverse
statement:
For every $x\in\mathbb{Z}$ there exists $y\in\mathbb{Z}$ such that
\[
x+y=0_{\mathbb{Z}}
\qquad\text{and}\qquad
y+x=0_{\mathbb{Z}}.
\]
